title: More Default Zombies
description: Allows zombies to have the appearance of any of the new default skins instead of just Steve.
body:
## THIS PACK REQUIRES [OPTIFINE](https://optifine.net/home)!


## Description

All zombies looking like Steve made sense when he was the only default player skin available, but now we have nine different characters to choose from, so why not nine different zombies? 

With this pack, all zombies (including baby zombies and giant zombies) have an equal chance of looking like Steve, Alex, Zuri, Sunny, Noor, Makena, Kai, Efe, or Ari.

You can change a zombie's appearance using a Name Tag with the name of their skin. Eg: naming a zombie "Alex" will transform it into an Alex zombie. All names are case insensitive aside from Sunny. Zombies named "Sunny" (uppercase S) will use the regular version of the Sunny skin, and zombies named "sunny" (lowercase s) will use the no-armed variant.

Zombie heads will also recieve random skins but cannot yet be changed with nametags. I'll try to add this in a future update.

This pack has only been tested on version 1.20.1 but it should work for all. If there are any issues, please let me know and I'll do my best to fix them.

## Installation
1) Download the .zip file
2) Open Minecraft and go to Options... -> Resource Packs... -> Open Pack Folder
3) Drag and drop the .zip file into the resourcepacks folder

## Guidelines for Use

Feel free to use this pack and/or my textures in your own projects/videos/edits/etc. If you do, please send me a link so I can see them!


Do not reupload this pack unaltered to other sites.

Do not take credit for this pack/claim that you made it yourself. 

Do not include this pack/my textures in any projects without crediting me.

Please link back to this page or specify "Beldama on Modrinth" when crediting.

Please do not put this pack/my textures behind a paywall (eg: Patreon) or include it in any projects kept behind one.

## Acknowledgements
Thank you to [ewanhowell5195](https://modrinth.com/user/ewanhowell5195) for his guide on random entity textures. I wouldn't have been able to make this pack without it.

Screenshots were taken using [Fullbright](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fullbright-ub).
